raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Settle-in check","name":"What’s been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"Safe opener that lets Priya set context before anything more pointed.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"pulse","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Post-launch landing","name":"Since Monday, where has your energy actually landed?","description":"Checks whether the quieter week looks like normal recovery or something heavier.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Quiet this week","name":"I’ve noticed you’ve been quieter this week — what’s behind that?","description":"Observation-first probe into whether reduced visibility is just post-launch drift or a sign of something unresolved.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Team landing","name":"How did the feature ship land with the team from your side?","description":"Surfaces whether the launch changed how she’s working with others or how much she wants to engage right now.","purpose":"topic","stage":"friction","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Next-quarter shape","name":"What do you expect to own next quarter?","description":"Gets her own view of upcoming ownership before any new work is introduced.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Ownership tradeoff","name":"What would you want to keep out of your plate next quarter?","description":"Forces a real trade-off around what she wants to protect as priorities shift.","purpose":"topic","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring thread","name":"What would mentoring actually look like in your week?","description":"Turns a vague intent into a concrete shape and reveals whether it is realistic now.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring stall","name":"What has kept the mentoring idea from moving?","description":"Surfaces the real constraint on a thread that never progressed.","purpose":"competency","stage":"momentum","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Unblocked next step","name":"What support from me would make your next ownership easier?","description":"Looks for the specific support she needs to take on the next stretch of work.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Close-out focus","name":"Given what we covered, where do you want to focus first over the next two weeks?","description":"Ends by narrowing to the most useful next move without opening a new thread.","purpose":"topic","stage":"lift","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]}]}
